growth_records.medium: Salt minimal medium (MM) with ibuprofen (IBU) as sole carbon source
growth_records.cite: Saati-Santamaría et al. Genetic and species rearrangements in microbial consortia impact biodegradation potential. The ISME Journal (2025). DOI:10.1093/ismejo/wraf014. [PMC11892951]
growth_records.snippet: Doubling times for each consortium were 6.75 h−1 for MPO984, 80.78 h−1 for MPO977, 36.43 h−1 for 34ibu and 28.47 h−1 for 38ibu.
growth_records.notes: Paper reports 'doubling times' with an apparently mislabeled unit (h-1 instead of h); treated the stated number as doubling time in hours per context ('generation time...calculated as the slope of the line...on semi-logarithmic scale', and narrative that MPO984 'reached stationary phase within 1 day', consistent with a 6.75 h doubling time). growth_rate_per_h = ln2/doubling_time_h = 0.693/6.75 = 0.103 h-1. This is a mixed microbial consortium (not a pure culture); R. wittichii identified as dominant species in this consortium (17% relative abundance also noted, MPO218 is the reference isolate strain for this species from a different consortium/study).

growth_records.medium: Salt minimal medium (MM) with ibuprofen (IBU) as sole carbon source
growth_records.cite: Saati-Santamaría et al. Genetic and species rearrangements in microbial consortia impact biodegradation potential. The ISME Journal (2025). DOI:10.1093/ismejo/wraf014. [PMC11892951]
growth_records.snippet: Doubling times for each consortium were 6.75 h−1 for MPO984, 80.78 h−1 for MPO977, 36.43 h−1 for 34ibu and 28.47 h−1 for 38ibu...consortium MPO977 showed a much lower growth rate, reaching stationary phase after 8 days.
growth_records.notes: growth_rate_per_h = ln2/doubling_time_h = 0.693/80.78 = 0.0086 h-1. Slow-growth consortium consistent with narrative (stationary phase reached only after 8 days); also noted this consortium could not fully consume the IBU present. Mixed consortium, A. xylosoxidans dominant species (also detected at 17% relative abundance in MPO984).

growth_records.medium: Salt minimal medium (MM) with ibuprofen (IBU) as sole carbon source
growth_records.cite: Saati-Santamaría et al. Genetic and species rearrangements in microbial consortia impact biodegradation potential. The ISME Journal (2025). DOI:10.1093/ismejo/wraf014. [PMC11892951]
growth_records.snippet: Doubling times for each consortium were...36.43 h−1 for 34ibu...These re-enriched consortia exhibited an improved growth rate, indicating an optimisation of...the IBU assimilation process.
growth_records.notes: growth_rate_per_h = ln2/doubling_time_h = 0.693/36.43 = 0.019 h-1. Improved (faster) growth relative to parental MPO977 consortium after re-enrichment.

growth_records.medium: Salt minimal medium (MM) with ibuprofen (IBU) as sole carbon source
growth_records.cite: Saati-Santamaría et al. Genetic and species rearrangements in microbial consortia impact biodegradation potential. The ISME Journal (2025). DOI:10.1093/ismejo/wraf014. [PMC11892951]
growth_records.snippet: Doubling times for each consortium were...28.47 h−1...for 38ibu. ...the growth rate and IBU removal rate of the 34ibu consortium was higher than that of the 38ibu.
growth_records.notes: growth_rate_per_h = ln2/doubling_time_h = 0.693/28.47 = 0.0244 h-1. Paper states 34ibu grows/removes IBU faster than 38ibu despite 38ibu having the shorter doubling time number reported here as computed; noted as-is from source text without reinterpretation.
